title: Longest Palindrome by Concatenating Two Letter Words
titleCn: 连接两字母单词得到的最长回文串

testcases.input: words = ["lc","cl","gg"] Output: 6 Explanation: One longest palindrome is "lc" + "gg" + "cl" = "lcggcl", of length 6. Note that "clgglc" is another longest palindrome that can be created.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: One longest palindrome is "lc" + "gg" + "cl" = "lcggcl", of length 6. Note that "clgglc" is another longest palindrome that can be created.

testcases.input: words = ["ab","ty","yt","lc","cl","ab"] Output: 8 Explanation: One longest palindrome is "ty" + "lc" + "cl" + "yt" = "tylcclyt", of length 8. Note that "lcyttycl" is another longest palindrome that can be created.
testcases.expectedOutput: 8 Explanation: One longest palindrome is "ty" + "lc" + "cl" + "yt" = "tylcclyt", of length 8. Note that "lcyttycl" is another longest palindrome that can be created.

testcases.input: words = ["cc","ll","xx"] Output: 2 Explanation: One longest palindrome is "cc", of length 2. Note that "ll" is another longest palindrome that can be created, and so is "xx".
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: One longest palindrome is "cc", of length 2. Note that "ll" is another longest palindrome that can be created, and so is "xx".
